senses.gloss: to turn from, to turn the back on

examples.text: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمْ تَعَالَوْا إِلَى مَا أَنْزَلَ اللّٰهُ وَإِلَى الرَّسُولِ رَأَيْتَ الْمُنَافِقِينَ يَصُدُّونَ عَنْكَ صُدُودًا
examples.english: And when it is said to them “come to what Allah has revealed and to the Messenger” you see the hypocrites turning away in aversion from you.

senses.gloss: to mock, to laugh at loudly
